suite: GoalOS Signoff Pro public route catalog v22-v35

labs.title: Action Graph & Human Authority
labs.promise: Convert accepted proof into bounded action graphs with reason, authority, rollback, and receipt boundaries.
labs.value: See why GoalOS never treats output as automatic permission to act.

labs.title: Proof-Carrying Artifact & Evolution Ledger
labs.promise: Make reusable artifacts earn upgrade rights through proof, ledgers, rollback, and evidence.
labs.value: Understand how accepted work becomes reusable without becoming ungoverned.

labs.title: Independent Replay & Claim Promotion
labs.promise: Promote claims only when independent replay, review, and claim maturity gates pass.
labs.value: See how one run becomes review-ready evidence.

labs.title: ProofZero Planning & Evidence Reanalyze
labs.promise: Plan over evidence states, latent work, validators, and bounded search instead of persuasive futures.
labs.value: Explore how GoalOS reasons about what remains unproven.

labs.title: Proof-Gated Mission Foundry
labs.promise: Turn accepted proof into harder next missions while rejecting unproofable or unsafe mission seeds.
labs.value: Watch proof become a curriculum for compounding work.

labs.title: Process-Resolved Evidence
labs.promise: Resolve evidence through process traces, lineage, provenance, and proof-native workbench views.
labs.value: Inspect how work history becomes legible instead of anecdotal.

labs.title: Blockchain Credibility Standard
labs.promise: Blockchain proves the transaction. GoalOS proves the work.

labs.title: Blockchain Proof Mandate & Due Diligence
labs.promise: Require the proof package before trust, funding, governance, reputation, or settlement readiness escalates.
labs.value: Turn the slogan into a stakeholder checklist.

labs.title: Proof Before Settlement Research Lab
labs.promise: Publish the institutional research standard, acceptance predicate, due-diligence rubric, and mandate clauses.
labs.value: Give serious stakeholders a paper-grade reference.

labs.title: Executive AI Proof Console
labs.promise: Choose a role and run a public-safe proof-gate simulation with no inputs, no uploads, no wallets, and no external AI calls.
labs.value: Let anyone understand GoalOS in one guided experience.

labs.title: From Loop to RSI
labs.promise: Move from proof-gated work to deterministic invention governance and RSI readiness.
labs.value: Connect proof loops to governed invention.

labs.title: Loop → RSI → ASI Console
labs.promise: Escalate from mission proof to RSI governance and ASI-readiness gates without self-authorization.

labs.title: ASI Superintelligence Control Tower
labs.promise: Run explanation modes, stress tests, rollback drills, council review, and Move‑37 dossier handling.

labs.title: ASI Mission Simulator
labs.promise: Choose role, mission, and explanation mode; run proof, RSI, ASI gates; generate a synthetic Mission Receipt.
labs.value: Experience the complete journey in one interactive lab.
